dashboard.propertyStatusPendingSubtitle: We're matching your lease and unit details now. Your property view will unlock as soon as the assignment is confirmed.
dashboard.quickPayDescription: See your next rent charge, check autopay, and jump straight into payments.
dashboard.quickPaySetup: Set up autopay when you're ready.
dashboard.quickPayEmptyTitle: Your rent schedule is still being prepared
dashboard.quickPayEmptyDescription: We'll show the next due date and payment shortcuts once your landlord finishes the billing setup.
dashboard.assistantTitle: Ask Ondo before you dig through menus
dashboard.assistantDescription: Use the assistant for lease questions, rent reminders, or to start a maintenance request with the right details.
dashboard.maintenanceTimelineDescription: Track the latest request from submission through resolution without opening the full maintenance page.
dashboard.maintenanceEmptyDescription: If something changes at home, send a request with photos and we'll keep the timeline updated here.

tour.assistantDescription: Ask about your lease, rent, or maintenance in plain language and jump straight into the right workflow.
tour.paymentsTitle: Use quick pay for rent questions
tour.paymentsDescription: This card keeps the next amount due and your payment shortcuts up front so you don't have to hunt for them.
tour.maintenanceDescription: The timeline shows whether your request is submitted, reviewed, scheduled, or resolved before you even open the ticket.
